ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of shareholder (Insider or Institution) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the shareholder */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the shareholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shareholder */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the shareholder joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholding */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "hold_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shares held */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the shares held */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the shares were acquired */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the shares were sold (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholdings_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholder_companies" (
  "shareholder_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "date_associated" TEXT /* Date the association between the shareholder and the company was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholder_companies_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholder_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (Buy or Sell) */,
  "shares_traded" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "value_traded" REAL /* Value of shares traded */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insiders" (
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the insider in the company */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the insider started employment */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction by the insider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insiders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insiders_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., Investment Firm, Bank) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the institution's headquarters */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual Shareholding, Transaction History) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final, Archived) */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on compliance issues */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance audit */,
  "audit_by" TEXT /* Name of the auditor who conducted the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security setting */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access to shareholder data */,
  "encryption_type" TEXT /* Type of encryption used for data security */,
  "password_last_changed" TEXT /* Date the password was last changed */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the last login by the shareholder */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "portfolio" TEXT /* Portfolio managed by the portfolio manager */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the portfolio manager joined the platform */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access to shareholder data (e.g., Read-Only, Read-Write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
